creator: furusawa@com.cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp
text:
Hello!

 My e-mail address will change.
furusawa@com.cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp -> kazu@jp.freebsd.org

 So,Makefile and DESCR must change.

I fix port:`xloadface' (ports/2165 )
(ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
                                     xloadface-ports.980204.tar.gz)

==================================================
diff -r xloadface.old/Makefile xloadface/Makefile
3,4c3,4
< # Date created:		28 November 1996
< # Whom:			FURUSAWA,Kazuhisa <furusawa@com.cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp>
---
> # Date created:		4 February 1998
> # Whom:			FURUSAWA,Kazuhisa <kazu@jp.freebsd.org>
13c13
< MAINTAINER=	furusawa@com.cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp
---
> MAINTAINER=	kazu@jp.freebsd.org
diff -r xloadface.old/pkg/DESCR xloadface/pkg/DESCR
7,8c7,8
< Orignal xloadface written by aito@rcais.tohoku.ac.jp.
< This port is done by furusawa@com.cs.osakafu-u.ac.jp.
---
> Orignal xloadface written by aito@rcais.tohoku.ac.jp .
> This port is done by kazu@jp.freebsd.org .
==================================================

      -   -     /       _/_/          FURUSAWA,Kazuhisa
   -          -(__o_   _/_/         mailto:kazu_f@big.or.jp           
O               \ T   _/_/      http://www5.big.or.jp/~kazu_f/        
|                / \  KAZU-------- mail address will change ----------
